titleStmt.title: SII 22.585: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 585. (A.R. No. 585 of 1906) CHITTOOR DISTRICT, PUNGANUR TALUK, EMBĀḌI On a slab lying in front of a private house Parak. Rājēndra-Chōḷa I-5th year and 23rd year.

summary.p: This records an order of the king passed in the 5th year of his reign while he was seated in the eastern hall called Madhurāntakan of his palace at Paḻaiyāṟu and said to have been confirmed in his 23rd year and 302nd day, fixing the amount of kāṇikkaḍaṉ due to the king every year by the residents of Perumāṭṭi in Puli-nāḍu a division of Perumbāṇappāḍi in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. These latter had got the village from other hands free of all restrictive conditions of tenancy. The date of the final execution of the order is given at the end of the record as the 25th year and 302nd day, perhaps by mistake for the 23rd year only.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
n taiyum poṟceya
celviyum taṉ teviya
lūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟai nāṭum
tuṭarvaṉa veḷippaṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḷ matiḷk
koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇ
ṇaik kaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻattaraicar tam muṭiyum Ā
ṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal te
ṉṉavar vaittac cuntaramuṭiyum Intira nārvamum teṇṭi
rai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimai
yiṟ cūṭuṅ kula taṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅka
tirmālaiyum caṅkatir velait tol peruṅkāval pala
paḻantivum ceruviṟciṉavil Irupattorukal Araicu
kaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cāntimaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Irut
tiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyu māpporu taṇṭāl koṇ
ṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājentra coḻa tevaṟ
kku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu yāṇṭu 2 10 3 nāḷ 3 10 2- nāl va
riyiliṭṭa keḻvippaṭi jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattup
perum pāṇappāṭip puli nāṭṭup perumaṭiyāṉa perumāṭṭi
p poṉ 2 10 1- kaḻañce Āṟumañcāṭi Ivvūrome yāṇ
ṭu 5Āvatu nāḷ 100 2 10- Āṟiṉāl Uṭaiyār śrī rājentra coḻateva
r paḻaiyāṟṟuk koyilinuḷḷāl tirumāḷikai maturāntaka
tevariṟ kiḻaimaṇṭapat teḻuntaruḷi Iruntu jayaṅko
ṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup perumpāṇappāṭip puli nāṭ
ṭṭup perumāṭṭi muṉ Iṟaiyuṭpaṭap perumāṭṭi Eṉṟu kuṭu
ttapaṭi pon 3 100 2 10 kaḻaiñcaraiye mañcāṭiyu miraṇṭu mā
vum nellu muvāyirattu 2 10 4- ḷamum yāṇṭu 5Āvatu
mutaṟ kāṇikkaṭaniṟaiyāy Iṟuppatāka Iṟaikaṭṭavu
m Iraṇṭu Iṟaṅkai kuṭiyai muṉ kāṇiyuṭaiyā
rai māṟṟik kuṭinikkāk kārāṇmai miyāṭci miki
tik kuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka veṟumutal tavirntu I
vvūrk kāṇikkaṭan pon Eṇ kaḻaiñcum
Ūrk kaḻaiñcu po
Irupatiṉ kaḻaiñcum In
ru māṭṭiyoṭum yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu
yorupuravāyiṟuppatākavum Ippaṭi yāṇṭu Aintāvatu
mutal Iṟaikaṭṭi variyiliṭṭuk koḷka veṉṟum tiru
vāymoḻintaruḷināreṉṟu tirumantiravolai I
rāmancoḻakulacuntara neḻutti nālum tirumantiravo
lai nāyakam rājentracoḻa brahmamārāyaṉum vi
llavaṉ muventaveḷārum Uttamacoḻappal
lavaraiyaṉum kaṭalaṅkuṭit tāmotirapaṭṭaru mi
navaṉ muventaveḷārum Oppiṭṭup pukunta ke
ḻvi variyiliṭṭuk koḷḷa veṉṟum rājarāja
muventaveḷāru meva yāṇṭu Aintāvatu 100 2 nāḷā
l variyiliṭṭatu yāṇṭu 2 10 5Āvatu nāḷ 3 100 2- vatā
yilum pirintatillai .
Digital edition of SII 22.585 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
